tables.html:
Study numberReviewer number Explanation
ScoreDefinition
1NormalConfident that no tumor recurrence is present in the ablation zone
2Probably benignThe appearance of the ablated lesion is compatible with post-ablational inflammation or rim-like characteristics
3EquivocalThere is doubt whether the imaging features indicate local tumor progression or inflammation
4Probably malignantConfident about local progression in the ablation zone
5Impaired qualityQuality of the images precludes adequate diagnosis
